about.headline: Software engineer building cyber-physical systems, AI agents, and resilient backend platforms.
about.summary: Associate Software Engineer with experience at Entgra and CodeGen International, focused on Java backend systems, IoT device communication, AI-powered ERP workflows, and software-hardware integration. Hasintha is especially interested in Java, Spring Boot, Go, Next.js, IoT, ROS 2, agentic AI, and LSTM models for behavior-aware systems.

education.degree: BSc (Hons) in IT Specialising in Software Engineering
education.institution: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology

career_plan.focus: Become a stronger backend engineer for enterprise IoT systems
goals: Build depth in Java, Spring Boot, WSO2-based services, and server-to-device communication protocols through current Entgra work
Improve reliability, security, logging, and troubleshooting skills for real device communication and billing automation workflows
Use production engineering discipline from CodeGen R&D and Entgra to move beyond project-level coding into maintainable platform development

career_plan.focus: Connect IoT, full-stack delivery, and AI-assisted product development
goals: Convert software-hardware experience from smart kiosks, hydroponics, freezer monitoring, and dairy-farm systems into stronger IoT product architecture skills
Grow Next.js, React, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD practice so embedded data can be delivered through polished, deployable web platforms
Continue developing agentic AI workflows with Python, LangGraph-style orchestration, and LIA-like assistant patterns
Develop Go, ROS 2, Kubernetes, and event-driven system design for scalable robotics, automation, and mechatronics-adjacent platforms
Apply LSTM models, keystroke dynamics, reinforcement learning, and behavior analytics from ongoing research to real-world monitoring and authorization problems
Publish and present project outcomes through GitHub, LinkedIn, university research, and engineering case studies

career_plan.focus: Grow into a technical lead for AI + IoT platform engineering
goals: Lead cross-functional teams that combine backend engineering, embedded systems, AI agents, and client-facing solution engineering
Design reusable platforms for intelligent automation in domains such as device management, smart facilities, agriculture, retail kiosks, and industrial monitoring
Mentor engineers while continuing research-driven learning in AI, cyber-physical systems, and cloud-native architecture

cv_content.summary: Associate Software Engineer at Entgra, previously Associate Software Engineer and Intern at CodeGen International. Experienced in Java, Python, JavaScript, React, Spring Boot, Arduino/C++, Docker, Kubernetes, and Agentic AI.

highlights: Java-based server backend work for IoT device communication protocols
WSO2 services stack for electrical meter communication and billing automation
Research and Development contributor across client delivery and research projects
Built with Java, Python, JavaScript, and React
Worked on AI-powered ERP and agentic solutions, client communication, and sales management
Integrated software and hardware for improved system functionality
Worked across the lifecycle of an AI-powered Smart Kiosk for One World Duty-Free
Contributed full-stack and hardware integration work
Participated in live client meetings and technical updates

projects.name: AI Agentic Development
projects.description: AI agentic applications for flight booking and hotel reservations using CodeGen's LIA platform.

projects.name: Automated Hydroponic Fodder System and Freezer Room Monitoring
projects.description: IoT-driven watering, greenhouse environment control, real-time sensor dashboards, freezer room temperature monitoring, motion sensing, and emergency backup handling.

projects.name: Dairy Farm Management System
projects.stack: MongoDB, Express, React, Node, IoT, C++, Arduino
projects.description: Production management, automated process startup, real-time process monitoring, inventory management, and smart storage monitoring.

projects.name: Food Delivery Microservices
projects.stack: Spring Boot, Java, Next.js, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD
projects.description: Distributed systems project using OpenFeign, Spring Cloud discovery, Minikube deployment, DevOps, and CI/CD practices.

projects.name: Ongoing Research
projects.stack: Go, Java, Python, Agentic AI, Deep Learning, Kubernetes
projects.description: Student grading system with integrated IDE behavior tracking, continuous user authorization with keystroke dynamics, reinforcement learning, and cognitive-level analysis.

achievements: SLIIT Rotaract badminton men's doubles champion
